title: Sir John A. Macdonald Day and the Sir Wilfrid Laurier Day Act
title_en: Sir John A. Macdonald Day and the Sir Wilfrid Laurier Day Act
short_name: Sir John A. Macdonald Day and the Sir...
description: Sir John A. Macdonald Day and the Sir Wilfrid Laurier Day Act (Sir John A. Macdonald Day and the Sir...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Sir John A. Macdonald Day and the Sir Wilfrid Laurier Day Act .

provisions.title: Sir John A. Macdonald Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the 11th day of January shall be known under the name of "Sir John A. Macdonald Day".

provisions.title: Sir Wilfrid Laurier Day
provisions.content: 3 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the twentieth day of November shall be known under the name of "Sir Wilfrid Laurier Day".
